data.body: S6 started (claude). Read S1-S5 src + existing tests/unit/grounding/. Baseline: 145 passed, 28.6s. Tools present: ctags 6.2.1, semgrep, ast-grep; ABSENT: scc, lizard, tree-sitter (= non-adoption state). Writing 5 new test files: conformance matrix, real-corpus yield eval, polyglot corpus, non-adoption, coverage reconstruction. No src changes.
